summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (2570 lines) to modular structure. All 43 backend API tests passed (100%). All 6 demo user logins working correctly via both API and frontend UI. Password hashing with bcrypt verified working.

design_issues.screen: Branch Admin Board - Leads by Branch section
issues: Multiple 'Unknown' entries shown for branches without proper names - cosmetic issue only

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all API endpoints remain identical in behavior
Password hashing with bcrypt working correctly - auto-upgrade from plain-text on login verified
Modular router structure properly organized: v3_auth, v3_config, v3_leads, v3_branch_admin, v3_appointments, v3_sheets, v3_dashboard
All 6 demo users can login: admin, businessdev, presales, branchadmin, headphysio, physio
Session management working correctly - logout invalidates tokens
Role-based access control working for all endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for regression testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 - Post-refactoring regression test completed. Backend was refactored from 2570-line monolithic server.py into modular files: server.py (45 lines), database.py, security.py, deps.py, seed.py, and routers/ directory with v3_auth.py, v3_config.py, v3_leads.py, v3_branch_admin.py, v3_appointments.py, v3_sheets.py, v3_dashboard.py. All API endpoints remain at /api/v3/*. Password hashing with bcrypt added - existing plain-text passwords auto-upgrade on login. All 6 demo users verified: admin@fitsiomax.com/admin123 (super_admin), businessdev@fitsiomax.com/bd123 (business_dev), presales@fitsiomax.com/presales123 (pre_sales), branchadmin@fitsiomax.com/branch123 (branch_admin), headphysio@fitsiomax.com/head123 (head_physio), physio@fitsiomax.com/physio123 (physio). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_v3_regression.py covers all V3 endpoints.

v3_auth.login_all_6_users: PASS - All demo users can login with correct credentials
